CSC 495 Final

Landon Armstrong

12/15/2021

Setup

Load the required packages and data.

library(tidyverse)

library(dplyr)

library(tmap)

library(dplyr)

library(tmaptools)
## Warning: package 'tmaptools' was built under R version 4.1.2

Thurston Parks

parks=st_read("C:/Users/cobra/OneDrive/Documents/SMU Junior/CSC495 Harold/Thurston_Parks.geojson")
## Reading layer `Thurston_Parks' from data source 
##   `C:\Users\cobra\OneDrive\Documents\SMU Junior\CSC495 Harold\Thurston_Parks.geojson' 
##   using driver `GeoJSON'
## Simple feature collection with 190 features and 25 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -123.2009 ymin: 46.76299 xmax: -122.2556 ymax: 47.15226
## Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#is.na(parks) = 0
#tm_shape(parks) + tm_raster(style = "cat")
tm_shape(parks) + tm_polygons()

Thurston = st_read("C:/Users/cobra/OneDrive/Documents/SMU Junior/CSC495 Harold/Thurston_County_Border.kml")
## Reading layer `Thurston_County_Border' from data source 
##   `C:\Users\cobra\OneDrive\Documents\SMU Junior\CSC495 Harold\Thurston_County_Border.kml' 
##   using driver `KML'
## Simple feature collection with 7 features and 2 fields
## Geometry type: POLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -123.2031 ymin: 46.76205 xmax: -122.2154 ymax: 47.18682
## Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
wetlands = st_read("C:/Users/cobra/OneDrive/Documents/SMU Junior/CSC495 Harold/Thurston_Wetlands.geojson")
## Reading layer `Thurston_Wetlands' from data source 
##   `C:\Users\cobra\OneDrive\Documents\SMU Junior\CSC495 Harold\Thurston_Wetlands.geojson' 
##   using driver `GeoJSON'
## Simple feature collection with 10043 features and 10 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -123.1986 ymin: 46.76264 xmax: -122.2018 ymax: 47.17407
## Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84

Reading Wetlands

tmap_options(check.and.fix = TRUE)
tm_shape(wetlands) + tm_polygons()
## Warning: The shape wetlands is invalid. See sf::st_is_valid

reading Thurston County with the parks

ths_bb = st_bbox(parks)
osm_map = read_osm(ths_bb)
tm_shape(osm_map) +
  tm_rgb() +
  tm_shape(parks) + 
  tm_polygons()

reading Thurston County with the Wetlands

ths_bb = st_bbox(wetlands)
osm_map = read_osm(ths_bb)
tm_shape(osm_map) +
  tm_rgb() +
  tm_shape(wetlands) + 
  tm_polygons()
## Warning: The shape wetlands is invalid (after reprojection). See sf::st_is_valid

Thurston County Wetlands and Parks

Thurston = st_transform(Thurston, st_crs(parks))

Thurston_bb = st_bbox(Thurston)
Thurston_map = read_osm(Thurston_bb)
tm_shape(Thurston_map) +
  tm_rgb() +
tm_shape(Thurston) +
  tm_borders(lwd = 2, col="black") +

  

tm_shape(wetlands) +
    tm_polygons(col="grey", lwd=0.1) +
    tm_lines(col="green", lwd=0.1) +
  
  
tm_shape(parks) +
    tm_polygons(col="red", lwd=2) +

  
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE, bg.color = "green",
            legend.outside.position = c("right", "top"),
            main.title = "Thurston Parks") +
  tm_compass(type = "8star", size = 2.5, position = c("right" , "top")) +
  
  tm_layout(legend.outside = T)
## Warning: The shape wetlands is invalid (after reprojection). See sf::st_is_valid
